title: Appreciating UBA Plc Robust Digital Penetration.

Appreciating UBA Plc Robust Digital Penetration

L-R: Abiodun Coker, Team Member, External Relations United Bank for Africa Plc, Friday Ekeoba, Managing Editor National Wire And Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge at 2023 Finance Correspondent Association Of Nigeria (FICAN) Annual Conference, with theme: Strengthening Digital Infrastructures For Efficient Innovative Payment Systems In Nigeria.
